mapper.insert: INSERT INTO venue_stage_config (venue_id, config_name, description, is_default) VALUES (#{venueId}, #{configName}, #{description}, #{defaultConfig})
mapper.select: SELECT c.*, v.name AS venue_name FROM venue_stage_config c JOIN venue v ON c.venue_id = v.venue_id WHERE c.venue_id = #{venueId} ORDER BY c.is_default DESC, c.config_id
SELECT c.*, v.name AS venue_name FROM venue_stage_config c JOIN venue v ON c.venue_id = v.venue_id WHERE c.config_id = #{configId}
SELECT c.*, v.name AS venue_name FROM venue_stage_config c JOIN venue v ON c.venue_id = v.venue_id WHERE c.venue_id = #{venueId} AND c.is_default = 1 LIMIT 1
